videoDetails.title: AI in practice: Real ways we're saving time and staying creative #janeapp #janecommunity
videoDetails.shortDescription:
AI is showing up everywhere, but what does it actually look like to use it day-to-day inside your practice?

​In this Ambassador Office Hours session, host Allie Joy is joined by Sean Overin and Emma Furze for an honest, practical conversation about how they’re using AI in their own clinics. From creative planning and business insights, this session is focused on how real practitioners and business owners are using AI to save time.

​Together, they share how AI tools can help guide smarter decisions, or be the starting point for marketing and professional learning, while keeping your work human and aligned with your values.

​If you’re curious about AI but haven’t taken the plunge yet, or you’re wondering how others are using it in their own lives and want grounded examples you can apply, this session is for you.

videoDetails.title: How AI Scribe changed charting for one solo practice | Clinic Spotlight
videoDetails.shortDescription:
What does using AI Scribe actually look like in a real clinic? In this Clinic Spotlight, Caitlin Cormier, a Speech-Language Pathologist and solo practice owner at Halton Hills Speech & Language Services, shares how AI Scribe has changed her charting workflow, and advice she'd share with practitioners thinking about getting started.

Note: AI Scribe is currently available in Canada 🇨🇦 and USA 🇺🇸

👋 Have questions? We’re here to support you at jane.app/contact 🩵

06:09 Getting Started with AI Scribe
10:07 What charting looks like now with AI Scribe
13:50 What is a Global Prompt?
15:06 Advice for new clinics
18:20 What's next for AI Scribe

videoDetails.title: Understanding AI in health and wellness with the Jane AI Scribe team
videoDetails.shortDescription:
Understanding AI in health and wellness: top questions answered by Jane’s AI Scribe Team

In this 20-minute webinar, we’ll help you make sense of AI with thoughtful answers to your questions, a clearer view of how it can support your work, and a bit of encouragement to help you get started. ♥️

Note: AI Scribe is currently only available in 🇨🇦 and 🇺🇸

👋 Have questions? We’re here to support you at jane.app/contact 🩵

2:26 - Secure and compliant AI Features
5:33 - How can AI Scribe help my clinic? 
10:02 - How do I introduce AI to my patients?
12:44 - When AI isn't the right fit
13:36 - What other jobs can AI do for me in my clinic?
17:17 - Chat with the Jane team

videoDetails.title: SEO in the Age of AI: How to Make Sure Your Clinic Shows Up Everywhere with Jane
videoDetails.shortDescription:
There’s a lot of buzz around AI and search these days. And while the landscape is shifting, traditional SEO isn't disappearing, it's just evolving.

In this session, we’ll walk through how AI tools like ChatGPT and Google’s AI Overviews are shaping how people find clinics online. We’ll also talk about what hasn’t changed, like the importance of clear content, trusted information, and a strong online presence.
We'll keep things simple and practical. You’ll walk away knowing how to:

You’ll walk away knowing how to:
✨Understand how AI, search engines, and online reputation are working together
✨Build trust signals (like reviews, profiles, and expertise) that matter to both people and search tools
✨Take clear next steps to help your clinic show up and stand out

🖥️ Want more help with your online presence? Book a call with the Jane WebsitesTeam 👉 https://janewebsites.com/websites

We can’t wait to help you grow your bookings and connect with more clients. Hit subscribe for more tips and insights!

- - - - - - - - - - - 
💡 Webinar (Re)Sources from Matt & Gabe

Want to dig deeper? Here are a few of the tools Matt and Gabe shared during the session.

Start with Google Search Console to see which searches are bringing people to your site. For more advanced insights, tools like SE Ranking, Ahrefs, or a quick domain rating check can help show how your site stacks up.

videoDetails.title: AI Scribe Prompting Workshop | How to Customize Prompts That Work for You
videoDetails.shortDescription:
Ready to level up your charting with AI Scribe? In this hands-on workshop, we explore how to get creative with AI Scribe and build confidence using prompts that actually work.

Alex (Senior Dev Manager) and Lauren (Product Specialist) share real examples, live demos, and practical ways to customize prompts to make AI Scribe fit your unique charting style. You’ll learn how to use Jane’s default prompts as a starting point, experiment with new ideas, and fine-tune your workflow to save time while keeping your notes clear and consistent. ✨

This session is all about learning by doing, exploring, adjusting, and discovering what works best for you. Whether you’re brand new to AI Scribe or ready to experiment further, this workshop will help you get more comfortable with AI and confident in your charting flow.

👉 Learn more about AI Scribe: https://jane.app/features/charting-ai-scribe
📖 Explore our Help Hub: https://jane.app/guide/ai-scribe-help-hub
🩵 Read our Getting Started Guide: https://jane.app/guide/ai-scribe-getting-started

Note: AI Scribe is currently available in 🇨🇦 and 🇺🇸

👋 Have questions? We’re here to support you!
🇨🇦🇺🇸 US/Canada | +1 844-310-JANE (5263)
🇬🇧 UK | +44 0 808 164 0893
🗺️ International | +1 604-670-JANE (5263)

- - - - - - - - - 
00:00 Welcome
03:49 Meet our speakers
06:04 What is a prompt?
07:30 How to opt-in to AI Scribe
08:12 Demo: Jane's default SOAP note
10:36 Why customize a prompt? 
11:23 Prompt progression
13:04 Demo: template library & default prompts
14:24 Demo: building a template (getting started)
17:55 Demo: customizing your prompt (finding your flow)
23:56 Experimenting with prompts
25:43 Live experimentation with prompts from the community space 
37:26 What's next: AI Scribe Free and AI Scribe Online Appointments
41:20 Join our Facebook Community group 
42:09 Q&A

 - - - - - - - -

videoDetails.shortDescription:
Join Jane’s AI team and Jess Reynolds, experienced wellness practitioner and founder of AIM Online Education to discuss the ever-increasing role of Artificial Intelligence in clinic life. Join us to learn more about harnessing AI to support patient care, improve operations, and much more.

In this session, we’ll cover:
⭐️ Jane’s vision for responsible AI-integrated healthcare
⭐️ Jess Reynold’s tips for using AI in your clinic
⭐️ What’s coming: a sneak peek at our first AI-powered feature

videoDetails.title: How AI Scribe is changing the way clinics chart with Jane App
videoDetails.shortDescription:
AI Scribe is Jane’s first AI-powered feature — designed to help you chart faster, reduce admin work, and stay present with your clients. In this session, we’ll walk you through how it works, show it in action, and answer your questions along the way.

You’ll get a behind-the-scenes look at how AI Scribe turns recorded sessions into structured SOAP or custom notes in minutes. We’ll also share how Jane’s privacy-first approach to AI helps keep your data secure and your workflow simple.

We’ll wrap up with practical tips from a Jane user who’s already using Scribe in their clinic, so you can see how it might fit into yours.

👉 Learn more about AI Scribe here: https://jane.app/guide/ai-scribe
🎟️ Save your seat for our AI Scribe prompting workshop on Oct 28th https://janeapp.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_QXq2CxMbTJOAC61o5p1KHQ

Note: AI Scribe is currently only available in 🇨🇦 and 🇺🇸
